skills.name: Dragonvein Awakening
skills.description: Elem., abnormal status, & affinity up with weapon drawn. Take damage when attacking, but can be recovered by continually attacking.

levels.description: Elem., abnormal status, & affinity up with weapon drawn. Take damage when attacking, but can be recovered by continually attacking.

skills.name: True Dragonvein Awakening
skills.description: Enhances attacks even more with weapon drawn. Take damage when attacking, but can be recovered by continually attacking.

levels.description: Enhances attacks even more with weapon drawn. Take damage when attacking, but can be recovered by continually attacking.

skills.name: Evade Window
skills.description: Extends the invulnerability period when evading.

skills.name: Critical Boost
skills.description: Increases the damage of critical hits.

levels.description: Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 30%.
Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 35%.
Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 40%.

skills.name: Blight Resistance
skills.description: Grants protection against all elemental blights.

levels.description: Reduces the duration of all elemental blights by 50%.
Reduces the duration of all elemental blights by 75%.

levels.description: Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 30%.

skills.name: Maximum Might
skills.description: Increases affinity as long as stamina is kept full for a period of time.

levels.description: Increases affinity by 40% as soon as the stamina gauge is full.
